violations.text: The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils (hot water urn) were not sanitized per interview. Establishment lacks 3 bay sink to properly wash, rinse, and sanitize. PIC removed urn. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2025

Frozen pastries were observed not marked with the date of thaw. Per packaging, thawing date must be labelled at retailer. Per packaging, items must be consumed or discarded within 5 days once thawed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2023
Frozen pastries were observed not marked with the date of thaw. Per packaging, thawing date must be labelled at retailer. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2023

Packaged kimchi and pickled ginger packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Items were removed from retail sale at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2023
